sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ هَيَا أَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ حَلْوَى لِصَدِيقَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Haja je htjela kupiti slatkiše za prijateljice.
sentences.translationEn: Haya wanted to buy sweets for her friends.

sentences.translation: Prebrojala je novac i otkrila da je dovoljan.
sentences.translationEn: She counted her money and found it was enough.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى المَحَلِّ وَاخْتَارَتْ أَنْوَاعًا مُخْتَلِفَةً.
sentences.translation: Otišla je u prodavnicu i odabrala različite vrste.
sentences.translationEn: She went to the shop and chose different types.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعَتِ الثَّمَنَ وَأَخَذَتِ الحَلْوَى فِي كِيسٍ.
sentences.translation: Platila je cijenu i uzela slatkiše u vrećici.
sentences.translationEn: She paid the price and took the sweets in a bag.

sentences.translation: Prijateljice su se jako obradovale ovom iznenađenju.
sentences.translationEn: Her friends were very happy with this surprise.
